bugs.title: Chat history corruption after heavy tool usage breaks both AI providers
bugs.description: After 7 messages with extensive tool calls (including multiple delete_itinerary_items and create_itinerary_items in a single turn), message 8 fails on both providers. Gemini returns 400 'Function call is missing a thought_signature in functionCall parts' for delete_itinerary_items at position 50. Claude returns 400 'tool_use ids were found without tool_result blocks immediately after: lenxy5rs, xk100qn9'. This forces starting a new session to continue the conversation, losing all prior context.
bugs.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Send 7 planning messages with heavy tool usage (create/delete itinerary items). 2. On message 8, both Gemini and Claude fail with 400 errors related to chat history serialization of tool calls/results.
bugs.expected: Message 8 should succeed and the AI should continue the conversation with full context.
bugs.actual: Both providers return 400 errors. Gemini: thought_signature missing. Claude: tool_use/tool_result mismatch at position 49/50 in message history.
bugs.api_command: buf curl SendMessage with session_id from prior 7 messages

ux_issues.description: Trip title still says 'Rome, Florence, & Venice' after Venice was cut from the itinerary and replaced with Cinque Terre. The AI updated the itinerary but never called UpdateTrip to change the title/description.
ux_issues.suggestion: When the AI makes a major destination change (removing/adding a city), it should also update the trip title and description to reflect the change.

ai_behavior_issues.issue: AI added a day trip to Caserta (family heritage) without being asked, taking up day 4 of the Rome portion. While creative, Marco's persona never mentioned wanting to visit Caserta or explore family roots in a specific town.
ai_behavior_issues.context: The AI inferred Italian heritage from 'Italian grandparents' and proactively added a Caserta day trip. This is arguably helpful but unsolicited.

tool_failures.input: Message 8 in the same session after 7 prior messages with heavy tool usage
tool_failures.error: Gemini: 400 'Function call is missing a thought_signature in functionCall parts' at position 50. Claude: 400 'tool_use ids found without tool_result blocks immediately after' at position 49.

usefulness_evaluation.narrative: The AI handled rapid-fire modifications impressively well through 7 messages, correctly removing Venice, adding Cinque Terre, maintaining vegetarian preferences, adding Pompeii and wine tasting, and providing excellent train pass advice. The itinerary quality was outstanding with 35 well-structured items across 10 days. However, a critical P1 bug caused both AI providers to fail after 7 messages of heavy tool usage, requiring a new session and losing conversational context. The final summary in message 10 (sent in a new session) correctly reflected all modifications without Venice and with all additions. Companion mode was helpful but limited to 1 message due to hitting the daily limit.
